Connection.ServerRemoved:
{tag}
Server {server} was removed from the configuration.
Connection.ConnectionDelayed:
{tag}
Server {server} delayed the connection by {delay} seconds...

Recovery.ShutdownWaiting:
{tag}
Server {server} shut down, waiting for it to be online...
Recovery.RestartWaiting:
{tag}
Server {server} is restarting, reconnecting in {restart_delay} seconds...
Recovery.RestartUnreachable:
{tag}
Server {server} did not come back online!

Commands.unknown: (f=yellow)Unknown command.(f=white) Type (f=green)help(f=white) to see available commands.
Commands.language.usage: (f=yellow)Usage:(f=white) language <userId> <language|default> | language list | language reload | language validate
Commands.language.reset: Language for (f=yellow){user_id}(f=white) reset to the proxy default.

(f=cyan)Connection Details:(f=white)
 - User ID: (f=yellow){user_id}(f=white)
 - IP Address: (f=green){ip}(f=white)
 - Client Version: (f=cyan){client_version}(f=white)

(f=cyan)Statistics:(f=white)
 - Connected At: {connected_at}
 - Duration: (f=green){duration}(f=white)
 - Last Activity: {last_activity}

(f=cyan)Network Traffic:(f=white)
 - Bytes Sent: (f=yellow){bytes_sent}(f=white)

 - Total Traffic: (f=yellow){total_bytes}(f=white)

(f=cyan)Session:(f=white)
{session}

- Server: (f=cyan){server_name}(f=white)

Commands.send.invalid_source: (f=yellow)Use a player ID or server name as the source.(f=white)

(f=cyan)System Statistics:(f=white)
 - Uptime: (f=green){uptime}(f=white)

(f=cyan){service}:(f=white)

Installed (f=green){count}(f=white) plugin update(s). Restart the proxy to load them:

Commands.update.available: SiteLink (f=green){latest}(f=white) is available (current: (f=yellow){current}(f=white)). Type (f=green)update(f=white) to install it.
Commands.update.installing: Installing SiteLink (f=green){latest}(f=white) over (f=yellow){current}(f=white); the proxy will restart.
